cross_scene_arcs.title: From Undercover Escape to New Assignment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Amy escapes a dangerous undercover situation with recorded evidence, then is assigned by Charles to investigate the Deaders based on a mysterious tape.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: In immediate danger in a crack den, seeking to escape undetected.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Assigned to a new investigation requiring travel to Europe.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: What the Deaders are and the origin of the mysterious tape.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Investigating Marla's Death and the Puzzle Box
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Amy finds Marla dead, retrieves an envelope and puzzle box, watches a posthumous tape with instructions, commits to uncovering the truth despite warnings, and obtains the location of Winter's followers.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Investigating Marla's death and retrieving key items.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Has the address at Poteilari and Minvara and is determined to continue the investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The contents of the envelope, the nature of the puzzle box, and what she will find at the location.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation and Resistance Against Winter
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Winter confronts Amy, claims the puzzle box, and warns her of danger; later, Amy resists the Deaders and fights back physically when surrounded.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Confronted by Winter in his room, threatened and uncertain.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Fighting free from the Deaders and becoming a fugitive.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Amy can fully escape Winter's control and the exact nature of the danger she faces.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Supernatural Revelation and Ultimate Sacrifice
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pinhead reveals Amy is recruited in a supernatural war, Marla tells her she is the chosen one who must solve the puzzle tied to her trauma, and Amy kills herself to deny Pinhead her soul, banishing the Cenobites.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Injured and confronted by Pinhead, beginning to accept supernatural reality.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dead, having sacrificed herself to banish the Cenobites back to the void.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: None, as Amy achieves her goal of preventing her soul from being taken.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Archivist to Victim
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marla Chen starts as the Deader Archivist filming the group but is later found dead, introducing the mystery of her death and connection to Winter.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Actively filming as the official Deader Archivist
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dead, with an envelope and puzzle box discovered by Amy
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cause of death and full extent of her relationship with Winter

cross_scene_arcs.title: Posthumous Guidance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Through videotapes and encounters, Marla guides Amy—warning about Winter, explaining her past, and urging resistance—until her final advice and death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Recorded message instructing Amy to go to Pletkow station and save others
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dies after advising Amy to resist Pinhead by not giving her soul willingly
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Amy will succeed in following Marla's guidance and saving others

cross_scene_arcs.title: Altered Existence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After being found dead, Marla is revealed by Winter to be in a non-living state, appearing in a decaying form to assist Amy, highlighting her altered existence and conflict with Winter.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Confirmed dead with evidence linking to Winter
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In a decaying, non-living state guiding Amy on an abandoned track
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Exact nature of Marla's existence and Winter's control over her

cross_scene_arcs.title: Winter's Pursuit of the Puzzle Box
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Winter aims to have the Puzzle Box opened and convert Amy through rituals, but his plan is thwarted by her rejection, leading to his death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Winter seeks to open the Puzzle Box for unknown pleasures.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ritual fails, Winter is killed by Pinhead.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The consequences of the failed ritual and the emergence of Cenobites.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Winter's Adversarial Relationship with Amy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: From indirect awareness to direct confrontations, Winter establishes an adversarial dynamic with Amy, culminating in her rejection of his offer and his death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Winter is known to Amy only through videotapes and warnings.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Winter directly confronts Amy, is rejected, and dies.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How Amy will move forward after these encounters.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Winter's Supernatural Demonstrations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Winter repeatedly demonstrates resurrection abilities, vanishing acts, and control over others, establishing his supernatural status but ultimately facing limitations.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Winter is shown to have resurrection power.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: His abilities are used but do not prevent his demise.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent and source of his powers.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Winter's Connection to Marla Chen
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Winter is associated with Marla Chen, initially as a threat, but later revealed to have revived her in the past.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Winter is photographed with Marla, indicating association.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Marla reveals Winter revived her, showing a complex relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The nature of their relationship and Marla's current allegiance.
